info.name: Retrieve disability rating of authorized Veteran

items.docs: This endpoint provides a veteran's combined and individual disability rating(s) and related decisions and dates.

info.name: Retrieve service history of authorized Veteran

items.docs:
This endpoint provides a veteran's detailed service history including all
military service episodes with the first and last name of the Veteran, the branch of
service, start and end dates, paygrade, discharge status, and separation reason.
It also provides start and end dates and locations for each deployment within each
episode of service.

info.name: Confirms whether an individual is a Veteran

items.docs: The Veteran Confirmation API allows you to confirm Veteran status for a given person. This can be useful for offering Veterans discounts or other benefits.
